ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the course (e.g., IDTH, INDE) */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number (e.g., 301) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "college" TEXT /* College offering the course (e.g., FM, EA) */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate) */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., 100, 200, 300) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite course IDs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course this section belongs to */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching this section */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in this section */,
  "actual_enroll" INTEGER /* Actual number of students enrolled in this section */,
  "max_seats" INTEGER /* Maximum number of seats available in this section */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_size" INTEGER /* Current number of students on the waitlist */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the section is open for enrollment */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the section is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the section is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college (e.g., FM, EA) */,
  "dean" TEXT /* Name of the dean of the college */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean of the college, linking to the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colleges_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., IDTH, INDE) */,
  "chair" TEXT /* Name of the chair of the department */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the department belongs to */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chair of the department, linking to the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section this meeting belongs to */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., M, T, W, Th, F, S) */,
  "begin_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the meeting is held */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number where the meeting is held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the meeting is online */,
  "zoom_link" TEXT /* Zoom link for online meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor, linking to the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the section */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolling in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the section */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Enrolled, Waitlisted, Dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., Student, Instructor, Administrator, Dean) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlist" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is waiting for */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlist_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlist_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
